file.content:
{
  "name": "@lichenxi.cat/cc-anywhere",
  "version": "0.0.5",
  "description": "Transparent local proxy for Claude Code that bridges sessions to a mobile/web SPA via a relay server — interact with your Claude Code sessions from anywhere.",
  "keywords": [
    "claude-code",
    "cli",
    "proxy",
    "remote",
    "mobile",
    "pty",
    "websocket"
  ],
  "license": "MIT",
  "author": "<USER> <<EMAIL>>",
  "homepage": "https://github.com/lichenxicatapple-blip/cc-anywhere",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "git+https://github.com/lichenxicatapple-blip/cc-anywhere.git"
  },
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/lichenxicatapple-blip/cc-anywhere/issues"
  },
  "type": "module",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20"
  },
  "files": [
    "dist",
    "README.md",
    "LICENSE"
  ],
  "bin": {
    "cc-anywhere": "./dist/index.js"
  },
  "imports": {
    "#src/*": "./src/*"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsup",
    "dev": "tsx src/index.ts",
    "serve": "tsx src/serve.ts",
    "sample:stream-json": "tsx scripts/sample-stream-json.ts",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "postinstall": "chmod +x node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-*/spawn-helper 2>/dev/null || true",
    "prepublishOnly": "pnpm run build"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@xterm/addon-serialize": "^0.14.0",
    "@xterm/addon-unicode-graphemes": "^0.4.0",
    "@xterm/headless": "^6.0.0",
    "commander": "^14.0.3",
    "nanoid": "^5.1.7",
    "node-pty": "^1.1.0",
    "pino": "^10.3.1",
    "ws": "^8.20.0",
    "zod": "^4.3.6"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@cc-anywhere/shared": "workspace:*",
    "@lichenxi.cat/cc-anywhere-relay": "workspace:*",
    "@types/node": "^25.5.2",
    "@types/ws": "^8.18.1",
    "vitest": "^4.1.2"
  }
}
